'''Sundancer Squadron''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] composed of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]]. It saw service in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] where it was assigned to the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Crucible (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Crucible'']].

When the ''Crucible'' was sent to rescue factory personnel in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]] from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack, Sundancer Squadron went with it. Upon arrival, the squadron was given the dangerous task of suppressing Imperial starfighters and escorting [[Blood Squadron]] in its mission to torpedo the Imperial [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]], [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']]. However, both it and its wards were annihilated with the factory and the ''Crucible''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
